title: cyanotis ceylanica
intro: Cyanotis ceylanica, also known as the 'Blue Starflower' or 'Blue-eyed Grass', is a perennial herb belonging to the family Commelinaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyanotis ceylanica include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers, as well as its potential in treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Cyanotis ceylanica may include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
